backend/main.mo: Minimal Motoko actor that includes and exposes the blob-storage MixinStorage functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Structured report mapping implemented frontend features to affected files, components, test requirements, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten high-level summaries of frontend source files, components, hooks, and configuration for documentation and planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS setup defining OKLCH-based design tokens, light/dark theme variables, and base element styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point that defines the root container and loads the React application module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component composing all context providers, layout components, and the fullscreen PlayerAnimationOverlay.
frontend/src/components/AppErrorBoundary: React error boundary that catches runtime errors, logs details, and renders a styled recovery UI with reload support.
frontend/src/components/BackgroundAmbian: Empty or placeholder component file intended for selecting background ambiance options.
Popup UI for selecting background ambiance sounds, with theme-aware styling, localization handling, and keyboard escape support.
frontend/src/components/DurationSelector: Modal popup component that lets users select a duration via a slider, handling escape key and outside clicks to close. It adapts styling and gradients based on the active visual theme and syncs local state with the current duration.
frontend/src/components/EmbeddedVisualiz: This file currently has no implementation or content, indicating a placeholder or unfinished visualization component.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component rendering a styled container with borders and backdrop blur, with all inner content intentionally removed.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyCard.ts: UI card component for a frequency sound, providing play/stop controls and optional add-to-playlist functionality with temporary visual feedback. It supports disabled states, localization, and responsive styling.
frontend/src/components/FrequencyList.ts: This file is empty, suggesting a missing or yet-to-be-implemented list component for frequencies.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component that displays controls for language, theme, and background ambiance selection. It manages popup state and dynamically adjusts colors and labels based on the active visual theme and detected language.
frontend/src/components/KidsSleepSoundCa: Card component for kids sleep sounds with play/stop and optional playlist actions. It mirrors FrequencyCard behavior while using localized titles based on sound category and language.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: This file contains no code, likely serving as a placeholder for a future language selector component.

Popup component that allows users to change the application language, positioning itself relative to the header language button. It handles escape key closing, viewport-aware positioning, and theme-based styling.
frontend/src/components/MainPlayer.tsx: Primary audio player UI that controls playback, volume, duration, playlist access, and fullscreen visualization, adapting labels and styles to language and visual theme.
frontend/src/components/MoodSpace.tsx: Renders a selectable grid of moods and displays mood-based recommended sounds once a mood is chosen, with localized text and visual glow effects.
frontend/src/components/PeacefulSoundCar: Card component for a single peaceful sound with play/stop controls and optional add-to-playlist functionality, including temporary checkmark feedback.
frontend/src/components/PlayerAnimationO: Fullscreen canvas overlay that renders animated meditation visuals based on the current frequency or sound, with intensity control and close handling.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPanel.ts: File is present but contains no implementation or exported component.
frontend/src/components/PlaylistPopup.ts: Modal popup for viewing and managing the current playlist, including play, reorder, shuffle, and remove actions with theme-adaptive styling.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedSound: Displays mood-based recommended frequencies or sounds with options to play immediately, add to playlist, or start a session, coordinating with player and playlist managers.
frontend/src/components/SessionPanel.tsx: File is present but contains no implementation or exported component.
frontend/src/components/SoundWaveVisuali: Renders a full-screen canvas-based animated sound wave and particle visualization driven by audio frequency, sound ID, and visual intensity. Selects animation presets dynamically and closes on screen click.
Displays a theme-based background image with animated gradient overlays and an audio-intensity-driven pulse layer. Reacts to the active visual theme and unified audio intensity.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelector.ts: Empty or placeholder component file with no implementation provided.
frontend/src/components/ThemeSelectorPop: Popup UI for selecting a visual theme with keyboard escape handling, localized title logic, and theme-specific styling. Updates the global visual theme and closes on selection.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedFrequency: Main selector UI for frequencies, kids sleep sounds, peaceful sounds, and mood space, coordinating playback with sessions and playlists. Applies theme-specific gradients and glow styles to interactive cards.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedPlaylistP: Empty or placeholder component file with no implementation provided.
frontend/src/components/UnifiedSessionPa: UI panel for starting, displaying, pausing, resuming, and stopping predefined audio sessions with progress and time remaining. Integrates with the main player and localized session labels.
frontend/src/hooks/UnifiedAudioManagerCo: Context provider that syncs the main player state to a unified audio manager and exposes playback controls, volume, and intensity. Ensures audio output reflects current frequency or sound selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and caches a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity. Recreates the actor on identity change and invalidates dependent queries.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioActivation.ts: Provides a context that unlocks Web Audio on first user interaction by playing a short silent sound, tracks activation state, and shows a brief visual indicator at the touch/click position.
frontend/src/hooks/useAudioManager.ts: This file is empty and does not currently implement any audio management logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useBackgroundAmbiance: Manages looping background ambiance sounds via Web Audio API, with fade-in/out, persistence in localStorage, and coordination with the main player to avoid overlap.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context using Dfinity AuthClient, handling login, logout, identity persistence, and detailed login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useLanguage.tsx: Provides a language context with persisted user language selection and exposes translated strings based on the current language.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayer.tsx: Defines the main audio player state and controls, including playback modes, queues, repeat/shuffle logic, and a sleep timer that stops playback after a selected duration.
frontend/src/hooks/useMainPlayerAudioSyn: This file is empty and contains no audio synchronization logic.
frontend/src/hooks/usePlaylistManager.ts: This file is empty and does not currently implement playlist management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Intentionally empty placeholder indicating the app does not use backend queries and relies entirely on client-side logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useSessionManager.ts: This file is empty and does not currently implement session management.
frontend/src/hooks/useTheme.tsx: Provides a visual theme context with persisted theme selection stored in localStorage and a hook for accessing and updating the current theme.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedAudioManage: Unified audio manager hook that plays frequencies via Web Audio API or native Android audio, tracks playback state and volume, and computes real-time intensity for visualizations.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedPlaylistMan: React hook that manages a unified playlist of frequencies and sounds using the main player as the source of truth, with helpers to add/remove items, start/stop playback, loop, and track elapsed time.
frontend/src/hooks/useUnifiedSessionMana: React hook for running predefined or custom meditation sessions by sequencing frequency playback over time, handling start, pause, resume, stop, and duration-based index updates via the main player.
frontend/src/hooks/useVisualization.tsx: Context provider and hook for managing visualization fullscreen state, exposing toggle/set helpers and safely persisting preferences to localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS configuration defining light/dark theme color variables, base styles, utility classes, and custom animations and visual effects.
frontend/src/lib/androidAudioBridge.ts: Defensive wrapper around an optional Android WebView audio bridge, providing safe availability checks and play/stop methods that never throw.
frontend/src/lib/androidNativeSoundId.ts: Utility for converting web sound IDs to Android native res/raw IDs using an explicit mapping table with a deterministic normalization fallback.
frontend/src/lib/kidsSleepSounds.ts: Static catalog of kids sleep sounds with IDs, localization keys, and categories for use in the UI and playback logic.
frontend/src/lib/meditationAnimationMapp: Defines animation types and maps sound IDs or frequencies to meditation animation styles, with a fallback default. Provides detailed animation configuration presets (colors, particles, motion) per animation type, including frequency-specific variants.
frontend/src/lib/moodRecommendations.ts: Maps each MoodType to a curated list of recommended frequencies and sound IDs used for mood-based suggestions in the app.
frontend/src/lib/moods.ts: Defines supported mood types and exports metadata for each mood, including icon paths and glow colors for UI presentation.
frontend/src/lib/peacefulSounds.ts: Lists available peaceful ambient sounds with stable IDs and short internal titles used across recommendations and playlists.
frontend/src/lib/translations.ts: Defines language support, translation schemas, and a large localized string dictionary covering UI text, categories, moods, sounds, and sessions for 11 languages.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app, wiring React Query and InternetIdentity providers before rendering the root App component.
frontend/src/startupDiagnostics.ts: Empty placeholder file, likely reserved for future startup checks or diagnostic logging.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining theme tokens, color system, animations, responsive breakpoints, and plugins used across the frontend UI.
project_state.json: Machine-readable snapshot of the project’s current state, features, and direction, describing FrequencyVerse’s scope, architecture, and roadmap constraints.
